title: FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd:
FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
